records.heading: Read operation base/current previous sealed commit
records.why: RHP-015.4 starts from the already-published RHP-015.3 seal.

records.heading: Read current commit message
records.why: Record prior state before reconciliation update.

records.heading: Ingest remote CI status packet
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.remote_ci_result_ingestion --status pending --commit 6f570783f8886c4e83e7b9798f8eedbab30a7f32 --source operator-provided --note RHP-015.4 operator/connector provided CI status; no GitHub rerun or workflow mutation. --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-015-4-remote-ci-result-ingestion-green-seal-reconciliation\remote-ci-result-packet.json
records.why: Record status without claiming what was not verified.

records.heading: Render seal semantics record
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.seal_semantics --operation RHP-015.4 --operation-base-commit 6f570783f8886c4e83e7b9798f8eedbab30a7f32 --previous-sealed-commit 6f570783f8886c4e83e7b9798f8eedbab30a7f32 --remote-ci-status pending --remote-ci-source operator-provided --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-015-4-remote-ci-result-ingestion-green-seal-reconciliation\seal-semantics-record.json
records.why: Split base, previous sealed, current observation, and CI status fields.

records.heading: Reconcile local validation with remote CI status
records.why: Only green CI plus local validation closes integration.

records.heading: Compile RHP-015.4 reconciliation surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/remote_ci_result_ingestion.py rhp/seal_semantics.py rhp/green_seal_reconciler.py tests/test_rhp_015_4_remote_ci_result_ingestion.py tests/test_rhp_015_4_seal_semantics.py tests/test_rhp_015_4_green_seal_reconciler.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run green-seal reconciliation focused tests
records.why: Prove the CI status split and seal semantics before push.

display_rule: Repo compact summaries must be staged before commit; post-seal summaries must be volatile external.
